name: Choco-Nut Tarts
recipeInstructions:
Filling: In a saucepan, combine butter and chocolate. Stir over low heat until melted and combined. Pour into a bowl and let cool for 5 minutes. Using an electric mixer, beat eggs into the chocolate mixture. Add sugar, corn syrup, and vanilla, blending until smooth. Fold in walnuts.
To assemble: Preheat oven to 350°F. Roll out dough on a floured board to 1/8 inch thickness. Cut circles using 2 1/2-inch tartlet pans. Fill each pan about 2/3 full with the filling. Place the tarts on a baking sheet to catch any overspill. Bake for 30 minutes or until set. While warm, place one walnut half in the center of each tart.
Topping: In a chilled bowl with chilled beaters, beat cream, sugar, and almond extract until stiff peaks form. Do not overbeat. Pipe decorative topping onto each tart using a pastry bag fitted with a star tip. THE DESSERT SHOW
